name: HA-Fusion
description: A modern, easy-to-use and performant custom Home Assistant dashboard
compose:
name: slashnode-home-assistant-fusion-ui
services:
  web:
    image: ghcr.io/matt8707/ha-fusion:2024.10.1
    container_name: home-assistant-fusion-ui
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      HASS_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:8123
    volumes:
      - web_data-fusion:/app/data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:5023:5023
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_data-fusion:
    name: slashnode-home-assistant-fusion-ui_web_data-fusion
